steps.title: Identify what the goal requires
steps.content: The goal is to “indicate the location” of the Isthmus of Mansheya. This means the sentence must explicitly establish where this geographical feature is situated.

steps.title: Match the requirement to the choices
steps.content:
The correct answer directly indicates location by stating “located in Egypt” and specifying the geographic relationship: it “connects the island of Pharos to mainland Alexandria.” The other three fail the goal—
  • A treats it only as an example
  • D describes its function but not its location
  • B provides a general definition without mentioning this isthmus


That is the correct answer.
